title: selinum archangelica
intro: Selinum archangelica, also known as Angelica, is a biennial or perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Angelica include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, as well as its potential in reducing menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. Herbal preparations of Angelica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
